description: Conversational English box target with a negative-z point source position.
prompt: Set up a copper target box that is 10 by 20 by 30 millimeters. Put a 1 MeV gamma point source at z equals minus 20 mm, shooting in the positive z direction. Use FTFP_BERT and JSON output.

description: Chinese copper box target with gamma point source.
prompt: 请配置一个10 mm x 20 mm x 30 mm的铜盒靶，1 MeV伽马点源放在(0,0,-20) mm，沿+z方向入射，物理过程用FTFP_BERT，输出json。

description: Chinese proton beam through a water cylinder target.
prompt: 请模拟150 MeV质子束，从(0,0,-120) mm沿+z方向打进水圆柱靶，半径40 mm，半长80 mm，物理列表FTFP_BERT，输出json。

description: Mixed Chinese/English air box with gamma beam.
